changes: Improved and retuned all official vehicles significantly and fixed the problem of unusable top gears.

Rewrote the drag model to be more physical-based instead of using synthetic numbers. Now it also handles wind, and track weather is affected by that. This is still a partial work and tracks need to be updated.
Fixed a few errors with speech backend switching.
Menu movement speech is now interruptable. This fixes the problem of SAPI speaking old text while moving in menus.
serverChanges: Updated server room model and explicit race finish events for players.
Fixed bugs with race finish events.
